summary: Completed frontend testing of P1 features: Offline support and Mobile Form Execution for My Tasks page. All features working correctly on mobile viewport (390x844).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed import order in offlineStorage.js - moved 'import { useState, useEffect } from react' from bottom to top of file
MyTasksPage.js has minor eslint warning about useEffect dependency (task) at line 392 - not critical
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features (Offline support + Mobile Form Execution) fully tested. My Tasks page works correctly on mobile viewport. Tasks with form fields (Check tasks) have checkboxes, numeric inputs with range validation, text areas, and attachments section.

my_tasks_mobile_viewport.page_loads_correctly: PASSED - My Tasks page loads on 390x844 viewport
my_tasks_mobile_viewport.tasks_displayed_in_list: PASSED - 8 tasks displayed with scrollable list
my_tasks_mobile_viewport.status_badges_visible: PASSED - 'In Progress' badges, priority badges (high), risk scores visible
my_tasks_mobile_viewport.search_and_filter_visible: PASSED - Search input and discipline filter dropdown visible

task_execution_form.form_opens_on_task_click: PASSED - Clicking task opens execution frame
task_execution_form.checkboxes_present: PASSED - 4 checkboxes found in Check task form
task_execution_form.numeric_inputs_present: PASSED - 2 numeric inputs with range validation (Range: 1-4 bar, Min: 200 bar)
task_execution_form.attachments_section: PASSED - Attachments section with 'Add Files' button visible

form_buttons.cancel_returns_to_list: PASSED - Cancel button returns to task list

offline_indicator.online_wifi_icon: PASSED - Green wifi icon visible in header when online
offline_indicator.offline_banner_ready: PASSED - Offline banner code present (shows when navigator.onLine is false)

back_button.back_button_visible: PASSED - Arrow back button in header
back_button.back_returns_to_list: PASSED - Back button returns to task list from execution view

offline_storage_service.indexeddb_implementation: PASSED - Uses IndexedDB with 3 stores: tasks, pending_completions, sync_queue
offline_storage_service.cache_tasks_method: PASSED - cacheTasks() caches tasks for offline access
offline_storage_service.save_pending_completion: PASSED - savePendingCompletion() saves completed tasks for later sync
offline_storage_service.sync_pending_completions: PASSED - syncPendingCompletions() syncs when back online
offline_storage_service.online_offline_listeners: PASSED - Listens for online/offline events and auto-syncs
